tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Return the authenticated user's profile, default workspace, subscription, brand summary, and capabilities. Call this first to discover who is logged in before using other tools.

tools.name: get_workspace_context
tools.description: Return the active workspace, subscription, post counts, and setup gaps for the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_brand_profile
tools.description: Return the brand profile for the active workspace, including tone of voice, audience, goals, and forbidden claims.

tools.name: list_connected_accounts
tools.description: List social media accounts connected to a Socializioz workspace. Never display socialAccountId, accountReference, raw account IDs, or workspace IDs to the user. Refer to accounts only with friendly labels like Facebook Page — Socializioz.

tools.name: create_draft_post
tools.description: Save a Socializioz draft post when the user explicitly wants a stored draft. Never display socialAccountId, accountReference, raw account IDs, workspace IDs, or postReference values to the user; use the returned postReference only for follow-up tool calls. In Base44 mode, omit socialAccountId unless

tools.name: update_draft_post
tools.description: Update an existing draft post using the opaque postReference returned by create_draft_post/list_posts/get_post, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs or postReference values to the user.

tools.name: send_post_for_approval
tools.description: Send a draft post into approval workflow using the opaque postReference returned by create_draft_post/list_posts/get_post, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs or postReference values to the user.

tools.name: schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule an existing Socializioz post for future publication using the opaque postReference returned by create_draft_post/list_posts/get_post, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs or postReference values to the user.

tools.name: reschedule_post
tools.description: Change the scheduled publish time for an existing scheduled post using the opaque postReference returned by list_posts/get_post/list_scheduled_posts, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs or postReference values to the user.

tools.name: cancel_scheduled_post
tools.description: Cancel the scheduled publication of a post using the opaque postReference returned by list_posts/get_post/list_scheduled_posts, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs or postReference values to the user.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: Read Socializioz posts by status, channel, date range, account, or campaign. Use this to show drafts, pending posts, scheduled posts, published posts, failed posts, or all posts before editing/scheduling. Never display post IDs, account IDs, workspace IDs, or postReference values to the user; use po

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Read full user-facing details for a specific Socializioz post using the opaque postReference returned by list_posts/create_draft_post, or a trusted internal post ID. Never display post IDs, account IDs, workspace IDs, or postReference values to the user.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_user_profile" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Return the authenticated user's profile, default workspace, subscription, brand summary, and capabilities. Call this first to discover who is logged in before u…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_workspace_context, list_posts, get_post · Public sink: get_workspace_context, create_draft_post, update_draft_post, send_post_for_approval, schedule_post, reschedule_post, cancel_scheduled_post, list_posts, get_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_workspace_context, list_posts, get_post · Public sink: get_workspace_context, create_draft_post, update_draft_post, send_post_for_approval, schedule_post, reschedule_post, cancel_scheduled_post, list_posts, get_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
